name: Commander
description: (@MinUnits@) Sona gives you a random Command Mod every @RoundsPerMod@ rounds which allows you to alter the way an ally behaves during combat. Command Mods last @RoundsPerMod@ player combats even if they are not equipped.
tooltip: (@MinUnits@) Sona gives you a random Command Mod every @RoundsPerMod@ rounds which allows you to alter the way an ally behaves during combat. Command Mods last @RoundsPerMod@ player combats even if they are not equipped.
importWarnings: No executable effects mapped for breakpoint 1
